candidate_specs.description: Current adopted package: full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the terminal micro-step only.
Higher-gain unstable reference: same adopted full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the penultimate and terminal micro-steps with the live successor increment.
Safe lower-bound reference: replace only the live successor-increment direction with the exact cached direction while keeping the live increment magnitude unchanged.
Current partial-signal reference: 30 degree trust-region toward the cached increment direction while keeping the live increment magnitude unchanged.
Weaker direction-only trust-region: 45 degree cone toward the cached increment direction while keeping the live increment magnitude unchanged.
Stronger direction-only trust-region: 20 degree cone toward the cached increment direction while keeping the live increment magnitude unchanged.

increment_direction_component_table.where_produced: derived from the live preterminal successor value as z_on_next_live - z_on_k_live
increment_direction_component_table.used_for: live successor increment before direction-only reformulation

increment_direction_component_table.where_produced: derived from the cached preterminal successor value as z_on_next_cached - z_on_k_cached

increment_direction_component_table.used_for: fixed live increment magnitude for all direction-only candidates in this pass
